h1.visual_description: Large, bold, sans-serif font, centered at the top of the page. Used for major document sections.

h2.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, left-aligned. Used for primary sections like 'Introduction', 'Part' headers, and back-matter titles.
h2.example_text: Part I: New Children, Different Toys

h3.visual_description: Standard weight serif font, left-aligned, preceded by a numeral. Used for chapter-level entries in the TOC.

visual_matchers.pattern: Text followed by a right-aligned numeral
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table of Contents entry with page reference

visual_matchers.pattern: Centered numeral at the bottom of the page

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric page references in TOC; likely Chicago or APA style in body text (inferred from 'Bibliography' and 'Notes' sections).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Centered Arabic numerals at the bottom footer area (e.g., '5').
